title: astragalus macrolobus
intro: Astragalus macrolobus, also known as milk vetch or white milk vetch, is a perennial legume plant native to the grasslands of northern Australia and southern New Guinea. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to modulate the immune system. The health benefits of Astragalus macrolobus include its potential to reduce fatigue, improve cardiovascular health, and enhance the body's ability to fight off infections. Astragalus macrolobus can be prepared as a herbal supplement in capsule or tablet form, or as a tea, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
